commitMessage:
Use a consistent container CLI path in integration tests (#1621)

Use a consistent container CLI path in integration tests. See https://github.com/apple/container/issues/1602.

body.content: return (releaseDate > debugDate) ? releaseURL : debugURL
try inspectContainer(name).status
try inspectContainer(name).configuration.id
let (_, _, _, _) = (try? run(arguments: ["network", "rm", name])) ?? (nil, "", "", 1)
name
